Localization.Description: Configuration files of the pluggable authentication module were changed and moved. Attackers can change pluggable authentication module configuration to access user credentials or log in without a password.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A configuration file of pluggable authentication module {object.name} on host {event_src.host} was changed
User {subject.account.name} moved file "{object.name}" to the folder containing configuration files of the pluggable authentication module on host {event_src.host}
File "{object.name}" was moved to the folder containing configuration files of the pluggable authentication module on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed a configuration file of pluggable authentication module {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
